message:
feat(mermaid): add journey diagram layout and renderer

Add IrJourneyTask struct to preserve score/actor data through the
rendering pipeline. Journey diagrams now render with section borders,
task titles, score bars (colored by score 1-5), and actor labels.

- IrJourneyTask: node_id, title, score, actors
- journey_tasks field on MermaidDiagramIr (populated during normalization)
- render_journey: section clusters via draw_border, task rows via
  print_text_clipped, score visualization with colored bar chars
- Dispatch in both render() and render_with_plan()
- journey_tasks: vec![] / Vec::new() added to all IR constructors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
